item.title: A message from Mr. D'Alessio:
item.description: There will be a DRAMA Club meeting Thursday at lunch in rm.209

item.title: A message from Mme. Perron:
item.description: Due to todays hospitality field trip the Europe Team meeting originally scheduled for lunch hour today has been rescheduled to tomorrow. ALL travelers must attend tomorrows meeting in room 125 at 10:40 Thank You!

item.title: A message from Mme Bourdon:
item.description: A big thank you to all the 7/8 Student council for organizing, planning and decorating such a fun GALA. A big thank you to Elena for taking all of the pictures. Thank you to Mr.Vonesch and Teagan for setting up and running the sound system.

item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: Mme Bourdon is looking for 8-10 high school students who would like to help out during the end of year BBQ that is hapenning on Thursday June 11th and would need to collect community hours. please see Mme Bourdon today at lunch time at her office to sign up. Mme Bourdon would also need to meet with all the 7/8 student council today at 1:30. Please see Mme Bourdon at her office.

item.title: A message from Mrs. Brennan:
item.description: Garden Club will be meeting out front today after school for planting. See you there!

item.title: A message from the Library:
item.description: Could the teacher who has laptop cart #5, please return it to the library or contact Mrs. Chartrand in the library
